questionHtml:
A photon interacts with a nearby nucleus to produce an electron. What is the name of this process?

A. Pair annihilation

B. Pair production

C. Electron diffraction

D. Quantum tunnelling

meta.title: A photon interacts with a nearby nucleus to produce an electron. What is the name of this process? A. Pair annihilation B. Pair production C. Electron diffraction D. Quantum tunnel
breadcrumbLabels: 12.1 – The interaction of matter with radiation
